历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 4247, dropping to about 4949 in 2024 (a shift of about 700 places), then rising to about 4297 in 2025, showing a "down-up" fluctuation pattern over the past three years, with a baseline ranking of about 4297 for 2025; the science enrollment plan was 74 in 2023, 73 in 2024, 70 in 2025, and 71 in 2026, a slight increase of 1 person (+1.4%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (down 14 places from 48th in 2025), showing a decline; the university's reputation signal has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission incidents.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Traditional energy majors such as Petroleum Engineering and Oil & Gas Storage and Transportation have stable but slightly cool social popularity; popular majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence have very few enrollment spots (only 1 each); the total number of examinees in Xinjiang in 2026 is about 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025), with an estimated 163,000 science examinees, leading to intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4297, a slight enrollment increase of 1 person in 2026 (shifting the ranking number upward by about 37 places), a significant increase in the total number of examinees in Xinjiang (intensifying competition and pushing the ranking number upward), and a decline in the Soft Science ranking (slightly reducing attractiveness), the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4354, with a range of 3854-4854.
